content:
# Compositional Reservoir Simulation

**Summary**: A simulation method that models the multi-component behavior of reservoir fluids to account for phase changes and composition shifts.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2012-baarimah|BAARIMAH, 2012]] used ECLIPSE 300 to model complex compositional and phase changes in gas-condensate reservoirs.

## Key Results and Findings

- The MBO model showed results closer to the compositional model for horizontal wells than vertical wells in certain injection scenarios. ([[2012-baarimah|BAARIMAH, 2012, p. 35]])
